trails.name: Ben Lomond Track
trails.description: The Ben Lomond Track is a demanding climb and a full day's hike with an 1,438 m elevation gain when completed from Queenstown. On a clear day trampers are rewarded at the summit with spectacular panoramic views.

trails.name: UPPER UPUKERORA RIVER TO ARMY HUT
GLENROY WATER RACE TRACK
trails.description: The track follows the historic Welshmen’s Water Race through several creeks, then steadily climbs to Ben Cruachan with good views of Lake Wakatipu, the Basin and Nevis Bluff.

trails.name: CROMEL STM JCN TO IRTHING HUT ROUTE
KIWI BURN HUT TO WHITESTONE RIVER ROUTE
NTH MAVORA LAKE SWINGBRIDGE TO KIWIBURN
MAVORA W/WAY - GREENSTONE TO POND BURN
ACTON HUT SITE-CROMEL BASE HUT JUNCTN
MOKE LAKE TO LAKE DISPUTE TRACK
MAVORA W/WAY - BOUNDARY TO POND BURN
MARAROA RIVER TO KIWI BURN TK
CROMEL BASE HUT-MT BEE ACCESS ROUTE
Ben Lomond Track
trails.description: The Ben Lomond Track is a demanding climb and a full day's hike with an 1,438 m elevation gain when completed from Queenstown. On a clear day trampers are rewarded at the summit with spectacular panoramic views.

trails.name: Bob’s Cove Bridle Track
trails.description: On Bob's Cove Bridle Track you'll follow history along the original bridle track that linked Queenstown and Glenorchy.

trails.name: Bob’s Cove Track & Nature Walk
trails.description: This short walk passes through native bush to reach a stunning cove on Lake Wakatipu - it's a great option for kids.

trails.name: East Eglinton Track
trails.description: This challenging tramping route leads from the Milford Road, up the East Eglinton river valley through beech forest.

trails.name: Jack's Point Track
trails.description: A walk with superb lake and mountain views over undulating open grassland and scattered scrub, ending at Jack's Point.

trails.name: Lake Alta Track
trails.description: Climb to the picturesque glacial Lake Alta. In winter the route to the lake is through an operational ski field. It is not marked and covered by deep snow.

trails.name: Lake Dispute to Moke Lake Track
trails.description: Follow a 4WD track beside Lake Dispute and into high county farmland to reach the southern end of Moke Lake.

trails.name: Lake Dispute Track
trails.description: Zigzag up to a high country lake that is a popular fishing spot for trout.

trails.name: Lower Wye Creek Track
trails.description: This steep track follows the pipeline from the dam and leads you to the foot of a rock bluff. A further walk through beech forest takes you to the stream in the Lower Wye Creek basin.

trails.name: Mt Crichton Loop Track
trails.description: This well formed track features rivers, a waterfall, a historic hut/tunnel, native bush and views - plenty to keep kids interested.

trails.name: Nevis Valley tracks
trails.description: Access the Remarkables Conservation Area on these tracks.

trails.name: Seven Mile Track/Wilson Bay Track
trails.description: Walk or bike through regenerating bush and pine forest with views of Wilson Bay.

trails.name: Shirt Tail Track
trails.description: A track climbing through beech forest following the Shirt Tail Stream in Kingston.

trails.name: South Mavora Lake walking tracks
trails.description: Day walk options from the Mavora Lakes camping ground in the Te Anau area. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Te Kere Haka Track
trails.description: The Te Kere Haka Track follows the shore of Lake Wakatipu.

trails.name: Twelve Mile Delta to Bob’s Cove Track
trails.description: Follow the shore of Lake Wakatipu and enjoy lake views, native bush and ancient marine sediments. Twelve Mile Delta was a location for Lord of the Rings' Ithilien Camp.

trails.name: Arawata Bridle Track
trails.description: The Arawata Bridle Track follows part of the original bridle trail that connected Queenstown and Glenorchy.

trails.name: Peregrine Loop Track
trails.description: The Peregrine Loop Track is a walking and mountain biking track with excellent views of Kawarau Gorge and goldmining heritage sites.
